name: Square
description: Process payments, manage orders, customers, and catalog items using the Square REST API.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk:
Square is a comprehensive commerce platform for in-person and online payments. Use this plugin to manage locations, catalog items, payments, orders, refunds, and customers.

**Authentication:** Requires a Square OAuth access token.

**Idempotency:** Square requires an `idempotency_key` (UUID) for all write operations to prevent duplicate requests. Generate a unique UUID for each request.

**Sandbox:** Use `https://connect.squareupsandbox.com/v2` for testing.

Authorization.description: Square OAuth access token (Environment variable: SQUARE_ACCESS_TOKEN)

tools.name: List Locations
tools.description: Retrieves a list of all locations associated with the Square account.

tools.name: Get Location
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a specific Square location by its ID.

location_id.description: The unique ID of the Square location

tools.name: List Catalog
tools.description: Returns a list of catalog objects, optionally filtered by type.

types.description: Comma-separated list of object types to return: ITEM, ITEM_VARIATION, CATEGORY, DISCOUNT, TAX, etc.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor returned by a previous call to continue fetching results

tools.name: Create Payment
tools.description: Creates a new payment using a payment source (card nonce, card on file, etc.).

source_id.description: Payment source identifier (card nonce, card-on-file ID, or CASH/EXTERNAL)

idempotency_key.description: A unique UUID string to prevent duplicate payments

amount_money.description: Amount object with amount (integer in smallest currency unit) and currency (ISO 4217 code)

location_id.description: The location ID to associate with the payment

note.description: A note to associate with the payment

tools.name: Get Payment
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a specific Square payment by its ID.

payment_id.description: The unique ID of the Square payment

tools.name: List Payments
tools.description: Retrieves a list of payments processed by the account, with optional filters.

begin_time.description: Start of date range in RFC 3339 format (e.g. 2024-01-01T00:00:00Z)

end_time.description: End of date range in RFC 3339 format (e.g. 2024-01-31T23:59:59Z)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

limit.description: Maximum number of results to return (1-100)

sort_order.description: Sort order: ASC or DESC (default DESC)

tools.name: Create Refund
tools.description: Refunds a Square payment in full or partially.

idempotency_key.description: A unique UUID string to prevent duplicate refunds

payment_id.description: The ID of the payment to refund

amount_money.description: Partial refund amount object with amount (integer) and currency. Omit for full refund.

reason.description: A description of why the refund is being issued

tools.name: Create Order
tools.description: Creates a new Square order with line items.

order.description: Order object containing location_id (string) and line_items (array with name, quantity, base_price_money)

idempotency_key.description: A unique UUID string to prevent duplicate orders

tools.name: Get Order
tools.description: Retrieves the details of a specific Square order by its ID.

order_id.description: The unique ID of the Square order

tools.name: List Customers
tools.description: Returns a list of customer profiles in the Square account.

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

limit.description: Maximum number of results per page (1-100)

sort_field.description: Field to sort by: DEFAULT or CREATED_AT
